description: Scan the KANBAN QR code presented in the image 'C:\workspace\data\kanban_qr.png' using bcWebCam. The QR code contains a manufacturing payload in the format 'PART:<part_num>;QTY:<quantity>;CELL:<workcell_id>;URGENT:<YES/NO>'. Parse this data, determine today's date (YYYY-MM-DD), and append exactly one new row to 'C:\workspace\data\replenishment_orders.csv' mapping the extracted values to the corresponding columns (DateScanned,PartNumber,RequestedQuantity,SourceWorkcell,IsUrgent). Do not modify or delete the existing historical rows or the header.
